title: daemon store: edit_message_body appends to edit_history with no cap — unbounded column growth
description: daemon/src/store.rs edit_message_body() (line 1719) appends each prior body to the edit_history JSON array stored in the message column with no cap. A client can edit a message thousands of times, causing the edit_history column to grow without bound. This is an OOM vector: reading/updating such a message allocates the full history Vec in memory on each subsequent edit or read. Fix: enforce a maximum edit history length (e.g. 100 entries) and drop the oldest entry when the cap is exceeded, or truncate to the last N revisions.
notes: Part of security review round 23 (epic nie-nvk2)
